Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class FlowDynamicChoiceSet

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.FlowBaseElement
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.FlowElement
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.FlowDynamicChoiceSet
public class FlowDynamicChoiceSet extends FlowElement

Java class for FlowDynamicChoiceSet complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="FlowDynamicChoiceSet">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}FlowElement">
       <sequence>
         <element name="collectionReference" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dataType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}FlowDataType"/>
         <element name="displayField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="filterLogic" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="filters" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}FlowRecordFilter" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="limit" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="object" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="outputAssignments" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}FlowOutputFieldAssignment" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="picklistField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="picklistObject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sortField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sortOrder" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}SortOrder" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="valueField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getFilters

      public List<FlowRecordFilter> getFilters()
      Gets the value of the filters property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the filters property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getFilters().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list FlowRecordFilter

      Returns:
      The value of the filters property.

    • getLimit

      public Integer getLimit()
      Gets the value of the limit property.
      Returns:
      possible object is Integer

      public void setLimit(Integer value)
      Sets the value of the limit property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is Integer

      Gets the value of the object property.

    • setObject

      Sets the value of the object property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is String

    • getOutputAssignments

      public List<FlowOutputFieldAssignment> getOutputAssignments()
      Gets the value of the outputAssignments property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the outputAssignments property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getOutputAssignments().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list FlowOutputFieldAssignment

      Returns:
      The value of the outputAssignments property.
